$comment: Hand-authored upstream registry. Bridge between recon notes (free-form), source adapters (code), and shipped artifacts (data). Updated whenever a new upstream is reconned or an existing one ships, regardless of whether the adapter lands in the same commit.

upstreams.title: Statistical Reports — official tabulated post-election results
upstreams.coverage: Per state-year-body, 14 statements per Assembly election; 1962-present where digitised
upstreams.notes: Canonical for past elections. Per-election landing grammar: /statistical-report/{body}/{year}/{state-display-code}. ECI's signed download URLs (/eci-backend/public/api/download?url=<base64>) are time-limited and MUST NOT be persisted in sources[]. Per-state-year pinned catalogue lives in `config/eci-pins.json`. See docs/architecture/backend/sources-eci.md.

upstreams.title: Live and post-poll constituency results portal
upstreams.coverage: Per constituency per election event (e.g. AcGenMay2026, LSGenJun2024); current cycle + a few past
upstreams.notes: Canonical for ECI numbering, party affiliations, current-cycle results.

upstreams.title: Term of the Houses (assembly + Lok Sabha constitution / dissolution dates)
upstreams.coverage: All India + 28 state assemblies, current and historical
upstreams.notes: Used by maintainers to confirm election event naming (when did the 2021 TN assembly's term end). Not auto-ingested.

upstreams.title: State Finances: A Study of Budgets — annual publication index
upstreams.coverage: All 28 states + Delhi + Puducherry; current edition covers FY25 actuals + FY26 BE; per-edition only ~3 years of comparable data
upstreams.notes: Per-Statement XLSX shipped on the listing page; URLs include DDMMYYYY date stamp + opaque hex hash, change wholesale every edition. Per-edition pinned URLs live in `backend/yen_gov/sources/rbi_xlsx/urls.py`. RBI CDN (rbidocs.rbi.org.in) rejects non-browser UA — adapter passes Chrome-style UA at this call site only. See docs/architecture/backend/sources-rbi.md.

upstreams.title: Handbook of Statistics on Indian Economy — Appendix Table 1 (national fiscal deficits)
upstreams.coverage: All India national, FY80–FY26 annual (~46 years)
upstreams.notes: ₹ Crore series only; the % GDP companion rows interleaved on alternating rows in the same workbook are NOT shipped (would need a separate value_kind=percent indicator family). See docs/architecture/backend/sources-rbi-appendix-deficits.md.

upstreams.title: Handbook of Statistics on Indian Economy — Appendix Table 2 (Central transfers to States)
upstreams.coverage: All India national aggregate, FY08–FY26 annual
upstreams.notes: Nominal ₹ Crore as RBI publishes; NOT deflated to constant prices. Future indicator `fiscal/national_centre_transfers_total_constant_2011_12` deflated is in the long-coverage backlog. See docs/architecture/backend/sources-rbi-appendix-national.md.

upstreams.title: Handbook of Statistics on Indian Economy — state-level macro tables (GSDP series, debt long series)
upstreams.coverage: All states, FY12+ for constant-prices GSDP, FY51+ for current-prices national GDP
upstreams.notes: Wave-3 backlog #5–#6 (national GDP constant + current). Same family as appendix_t1/t2 — same fetch path through the AnnualPublications listing.

upstreams.title: Weekly Statistical Supplement / Handbook — RBI gold reserves
upstreams.coverage: All India, monthly (and weekly), 35+ years
upstreams.notes: Wave-3 backlog #14 (national gold reserves long series). Lives under the Handbook on Indian Economy, Statement 'Foreign Exchange Reserves'.

upstreams.title: State Finances Statement 8 (outstanding liabilities) — multi-edition stitched long series
upstreams.coverage: All states, FY91+ when stitched across multiple editions
upstreams.notes: Wave-3 backlog #15. Higher-complexity ingest because edition-to-edition column shapes differ; needs a multi-edition stitcher per state.

upstreams.title: State-wise Deep Dive — energy, economy, demography state series
upstreams.coverage: 28 states + 8 UTs + All-India, FY16–FY26 annual (11 fiscal years), 13 indicators per state-year
upstreams.notes: Encrypted JSON: CryptoJS-OpenSSL AES-256-CBC, passphrase extracted from SPA bundle. Uses urllib (not httpx) on Windows because httpx + certifi rejects icedapi cert chain. Unit caveat: ICED's metadata says GDP/GVA in 'Crores' but actual values are Lakh Crore — adapter overrides. See docs/architecture/backend/sources-iced-state-wise.md.

upstreams.title: Monthly Installed Capacity Report — All-India + per-state, per-fuel nameplate MW
upstreams.coverage: All-India + per-state, snapshot at end of report month, monthly cadence; archive available
upstreams.notes: Operator-fetched XLSX pattern: cea.nic.in TLS chain not in standard CA bundle on Windows / many CI images, so no in-adapter network. Operator runs `Invoke-WebRequest` once per month into .runtime/raw/cea/installed_capacity_<YYYY>_<MM>.xlsx; adapter parses. Archive listing at https://cea.nic.in/archives/?lang=en. See docs/architecture/backend/sources-cea-installed-capacity.md.

upstreams.title: CEA monthly Executive Summary archive (per-state long history)
upstreams.coverage: Per-state monthly snapshots, multi-year archive
upstreams.skip_reason: Windows TLS / certifi rejects cea.nic.in CDN cert chain for direct httpx fetch. Operator-fetch pattern works for current month (see cea.installed_capacity_monthly) but mass-backfill of the archive is high-effort. Workaround: ICED state_wise already provides 11 years of CEA-published values for the same indicators — use that.

upstreams.title: OGD platform — aggregated cross-ministry datasets
upstreams.coverage: Cross-ministry, mostly Rajya Sabha question driven snapshots; small fraction is canonical ministry data
upstreams.notes: Public demo API key (579b464db66ec23bdd000001cdd3946e44ce4aad7209ff7b23ac571b) caps records at 10/request and 429s after a few pages; production key requires SMS-OTP registration with PII (declined per user direction 2026-05-14). Operator-fetched CSV pattern: solve captcha on resource page, drop CSV into .runtime/raw/datagovin/<leaf>.csv. See docs/architecture/backend/sources-datagovin-ogd.md.

upstreams.title: State-wise Total Revenue Receipts, Own Receipts and Centre Transfers (FY17–FY23 Actuals, RS Q1323/2023)
upstreams.coverage: 28 states + Delhi + Puducherry, FY17–FY23 (7 years actuals)
upstreams.notes: Resource UUID 1f2e77f0-6742-4671-ae29-8836d2110a5c. Computed as Col.(4) Share in Central Taxes + Col.(5) Grants-in-Aid. *Gross* — distinct from RBI's Net (RBI subtracts loan repayments). Underlying authority: Rajya Sabha Session 260 Unstarred Question 1323 (1 Aug 2023).

upstreams.title: Search results for title=rbi (banking, payments, ombudsman, frauds — Rajya Sabha snapshot family)
upstreams.coverage: Mostly Ministry of Finance answers tabulating RBI-reported counts (bank frauds, ombudsman complaints, demonetised note recovery, internal-debt snapshots). Each resource is a 3–7 year window; few qualify as long series
upstreams.skip_reason: Mostly low-value parliamentary snapshots that do NOT duplicate the canonical RBI long-series we want for wave-3 (Handbook macro, gold reserves, State Finances Statement 8). The actual RBI long series live on rbi.org.in directly; data.gov.in's RBI surface is parliamentary derivative. Reconned 2026-05-14; future targeted picks (e.g. internal-debt snapshot if it complements Statement 8) can be promoted to candidate one resource at a time.

upstreams.title: All India Survey on Higher Education (AISHE) — institutions / enrolments by state
upstreams.coverage: All states, ~13y per state
upstreams.notes: Wave-3 backlog #7. Recon needed: confirm whether the data.gov.in AISHE resources cover the full AISHE series or only Rajya Sabha question subsets. Authority page: https://aishe.gov.in/aishe/aisheReport

upstreams.title: Constituency lists, district lists, election summary tables
upstreams.coverage: All states; quality varies by article
upstreams.notes: Bootstrap source only — never sufficient alone for `status: complete` per CLAUDE.md §10 / docs/architecture/backend/sources-wikipedia.md.

upstreams.title: India administrative boundaries (states/districts/AC/PC) and power plant locations
upstreams.coverage: All India
upstreams.notes: Community-maintained, not authoritative for legal boundaries. Surfaces a citizen-facing disclaimer per docs/concepts/disclaimer.md.

upstreams.title: State CEO portals — electoral roll counts, polling-station-level data
upstreams.coverage: Per state; format varies wildly (PDF, occasional XLSX)
upstreams.notes: Per-state landing URLs documented in docs/reference/data-sources.md. Not yet ingested — current pipeline relies on ECI Statistical Reports for AC-level numbers.

upstreams.title: Candidate affidavits — declared assets, criminal cases, education, expense filings
upstreams.coverage: Per election event; manual scraping needed
upstreams.notes: Use for candidate-level enrichment ONLY; never as a vote-count source. Cross-check vote counts with ECI before persisting.

upstreams.title: Local Government Directory — district / subdistrict / village codes
upstreams.coverage: All India administrative hierarchy with stable LGD codes
upstreams.notes: Currently consumed via the wikipedia district resolver (LGD codes are the canonical district identifier per CLAUDE.md §3). Direct LGD ingest is on the feat/lgd-districts-pipeline branch (in progress).
